name: Kangaroo Escalopes with Spinach and Anchovy Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the kangaroo fillet with olive oil and sprinkle lightly with black pepper.
2. Remove stems from spinach and wash leaves thoroughly.
3. Plunge spinach into rapidly boiling water for 30 seconds, then strain and immerse immediately in ice water to stop cooking and maintain color. When cold, remove leaves and squeeze out excess liquid.
4. Refrigerate until ready to use.
5. Soften 100 g unsalted butter and blend with anchovies, lemon juice, sea salt, and a pinch of black pepper in a food processor until smooth.
6. Scoop the mixture onto foil and form into a sausage shape. Refrigerate until firm.
7. Heat a large, heavy-bottomed cast-iron frying pan or grill plate until hot. Toss oiled meat slices in the pan and sear on each side without turning until properly sealed and not overcooked. Remove meat when all slices are cooked.
8. In another pan over medium heat, melt remaining butter, add squeezed spinach, and stir until spinach is heated through. Season with sea salt and black pepper to taste.
9. Divide spinach into four portions and spoon onto the center of each plate. Top with three escalopes.
10. Slice the anchovy butter over the hot meat so it begins to melt. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
